steps.title: Find who skipped workshop two
steps.content:
First find how many attended the second workshop.
$$0.70(2{,}400)=1{,}680$$
So the number who attended the first workshop but not the second is
$$2{,}400-1{,}680=720$$

steps.title: Apply the final percent
steps.content: Of those $720$ people, $35\%$ attended the third workshop. $$0.35(720)=252$$ The answer is 252.
